summary: Comprehensive testing of EdTech CRM Video Class Features - Iteration 4. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows verified working including Video Class page, Teacher Start/End Class, Student waiting screen, Teacher Schedule Calendar.

backend: All 4 role logins (admin, student, teacher, counsellor)
GET /api/teacher/dashboard - returns this_week classes and other_classes
Teacher dashboard class structure verified (class_id, title, status, date, end_date)
POST /api/classes/start/{class_id} - sets status to in_progress, creates room_id
Student sees class status when in_progress
POST /api/classes/end/{class_id} - resets status to scheduled or completed
Start class creates notification for enrolled student
GET /api/student/dashboard - returns credits, upcoming/past classes with status
GET /api/admin/classes - returns all classes with valid status
Classes have valid status for calendar (scheduled, in_progress, completed, cancelled, dismissed)
GET /api/teacher/student-complaints - teacher sees assigned student complaints
frontend: Teacher Dashboard loads with 'This Week's Classes' section
Teacher Dashboard shows Start Class button on class cards
Teacher notification bell visible in header
Student Dashboard shows 400 credits, 1 active class
Student Dashboard shows 'Cancel Today's Session (2 left)' button
Student Dashboard does NOT show Join button when class is scheduled (correct)
Video Class page (/class/{classId}) shows 'Start Class Now' button for teacher
Video Class page loads Jitsi Meet after teacher starts class
Video Class page shows Screenshot and End Class buttons when live
Student Video Class page shows waiting screen when class not in_progress
Student waiting screen shows 'Waiting for teacher to start the class...'
Student can join live class when status is in_progress
Teacher Schedule Calendar shows BOOKED status on all scheduled days
Admin Dashboard loads with Teachers, Add Student, Classes, Transactions, Complaints tabs

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing class 'JEE Advanced Math' (class_5bc43e070aa7)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 16 features verified working. Video class integration uses Jitsi Meet from meet.jit.si CDN. Class lifecycle endpoints (start/end/status) work correctly. Teacher dashboard returns {classes: [this_week], other_classes: [rest]}. Student sees waiting screen when class not in_progress, can join when in_progress. Teacher Schedule Calendar shows BOOKED/LIVE/DONE/OFF status. Stripe webhook endpoint exists (MOCKED - test key).

mocked_apis.Stripe payment: Uses test key (sk_test_emergent), webhook handler exists but no real Stripe events

features_verified.teacher_dashboard_week_view: WORKING - Shows 'This Week's Classes' section with Start Class button
features_verified.teacher_start_class: WORKING - POST /api/classes/start/{class_id} sets status to in_progress, creates room_id, notifies student
features_verified.teacher_end_class: WORKING - POST /api/classes/end/{class_id} resets status to scheduled or completed
features_verified.class_status_endpoint: WORKING - GET /api/classes/status/{class_id} returns status, room_id, is_in_progress
features_verified.student_join_button: WORKING - Shows 'Join Live Class Now' only when status is in_progress
features_verified.student_waiting_screen: WORKING - Shows waiting message when class not in_progress
features_verified.video_class_page: WORKING - Loads Jitsi Meet, shows Screenshot and End Class buttons
features_verified.teacher_schedule_calendar: WORKING - Shows BOOKED/LIVE/DONE/OFF status on calendar
features_verified.teacher_notifications: WORKING - Bell icon with unread count, notifications dialog
